Her name is Noémie.
She lives in Lyon and she loves painting, especially watercolor landscapes.

fact_messages: I am currently writing my master thesis.
The topic is an AI companion chatbot with long-term memory.
It also studies evolving personality, so the companion can adapt over time.

When I am in a reflective mood, that is usually the kind of music I want.

fact_messages: There is one conversation rule I want you to respect.
When I say I do not want to talk about a subject, please do not push me for details.
Just acknowledge it gently and move on.
